steps: Resuspend a single colony in 10 mL, liquid culture with antibiotic .
Induce with 4 µL or 40 µL of 100 millimolar (mM), IPTG stpck (final concentration of 40 or 400 µM).

Check for expression either by Coomassie stained protein gel, Western Blot or activity assay. Check expression in both the total cell extract (soluble + insoluble) and the soluble fraction only. If a fraction of the target protein is insoluble, repeat expression at a lower temperature (15 to 30°C) or test expression in Lemo21(DE3) ( NEB #C2528 ).
For large scale, inoculate 1 L of liquid medium (with antibiotic) with a freshly grown colony or 10 mL of freshly grown culture.
Add 40 micromolar (µM) or 400 micromolar (µM) IPTG and express protein using optimal time/temperature determined in a small scale trial.
creator: New England   Biolabs
